series_metadata.series_description: These files contain records and information regarding administrative proceedings, not related to supervisory actions, between the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and state-chartered bank.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years from date of completion of administrative proceeding, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
